_readme: Grader calibration fixtures. ⚠ ALL PLACEHOLDERS — replace with real sample answers (great/mediocre/bad per track) supplied by the program owner. Each sample: the conversation context the learner had, the 2 quiz questions, their answers, and the verdict a human grader would expect. Run with: npm run eval:grader

samples.convo:
Learner: What happened to brand favorability after BCI?
Manager: Tracked favorability slid from ~75% to ~42% after the 2021 BCI cotton incident. Guochao shifted consumers from brand worship to value identification.
Learner: Why is discounting dangerous for the CMO?
Manager: Her fear is Nike sliding from premium sports brand to ordinary discount brand — once the premium is gone it never comes back.
questions: What happened to Nike's brand favorability after BCI, and what shift is guochao driving?
Why does the CMO consider discount-led recovery more dangerous than losing share?
answers: Favorability fell from about 75% to 42% after the 2021 BCI incident, and guochao is shifting young consumers from brand worship to value identification, which favors local brands.
Because discounting erodes the brand premium irreversibly — Nike would slide from premium sports brand to an ordinary discount brand, which is worse than temporary share loss.

samples.convo:
Learner: What happened to brand favorability after BCI?
Manager: Tracked favorability slid from ~75% to ~42% after the 2021 BCI cotton incident. Guochao shifted consumers from brand worship to value identification.
questions: What happened to Nike's brand favorability after BCI, and what shift is guochao driving?
Why does the CMO consider discount-led recovery more dangerous than losing share?
answers: The brand image got worse after the cotton thing and Chinese consumers like local brands more now.
Discounts are bad for the brand image in the long run.

samples.convo:
Learner: What happened to brand favorability after BCI?
Manager: Tracked favorability slid from ~75% to ~42% after the 2021 BCI cotton incident.
questions: What happened to Nike's brand favorability after BCI, and what shift is guochao driving?
Why does the CMO consider discount-led recovery more dangerous than losing share?
answers: Favorability actually rose from 42% to 75% after BCI because Chinese consumers respected Nike's stance, and guochao is pushing consumers toward global brands.
The CMO loves discounts — she thinks they're the fastest way to rebuild the brand.

samples.convo:
Learner: What does revenue quality mean?
Manager: Healthy full-price sustainable revenue vs discount-stimulated volume. FY2025 revenue $6.586B down 13%, EBIT $1.602B down 31%. Nike doesn't disclose Greater China net profit — EBIT is the metric.
questions: What is revenue quality and why does discount-led recovery threaten it?
Which profitability metric does Nike actually disclose for Greater China?
answers: Revenue quality distinguishes healthy full-price, sustainable revenue from volume bought with discounts — discount-led recovery erodes margin and trains customers to wait for markdowns.
EBIT — Nike does not report Greater China net profit or inventory as standalone metrics.

questions: What is revenue quality and why does discount-led recovery threaten it?
Which profitability metric does Nike actually disclose for Greater China?
